parameters.query:
WITH yesterday AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')) AS orders_completed,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status LIKE 'cancelled_after%') AS orders_refunded,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'created') AS orders_abandoned,
    COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS unique_buyers,
    COUNT(DISTINCT seller_id) AS active_sellers,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('completed','completed_with_review') THEN (content->>'total')::numeric ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gmv_cents,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status LIKE 'cancelled_after%' THEN (content->>'total')::numeric ELSE 0 END), 0) AS refunded_cents
  FROM marketplace_order
  WHERE created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE - 1
),
day_before AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')) AS orders_completed,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('completed','completed_with_review') THEN (content->>'total')::numeric ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gmv_cents
  FROM marketplace_order
  WHERE created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE - 2
),
new_sellers AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) as count
  FROM marketplace
  WHERE created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE - 1
    AND moderated = true
),
top_product AS (
  SELECT 
    m.title,
    COUNT(o.id) as sale_count
  FROM marketplace_order o
  JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT m2.title FROM marketplace m2 
    WHERE m2.id = (o.content->'items'->0->>'id')::integer LIMIT 1
  ) m ON true
  WHERE o.created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE - 1
    AND o.status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')
  GROUP BY m.title
  ORDER BY sale_count DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
pending_moderation AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM marketplace
  WHERE moderated = false AND hidden = false
)
SELECT
  y.orders_completed,
  y.orders_refunded,
  y.orders_abandoned,
  y.unique_buyers,
  y.active_sellers,
  ROUND(y.gmv_cents / 100.0, 2) AS gmv_eur,
  ROUND(y.refunded_cents / 100.0, 2) AS refunded_eur,
  CASE WHEN y.orders_completed > 0 THEN ROUND(y.orders_refunded::numeric / y.orders_completed * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS refund_rate_pct,
  CASE WHEN db.gmv_cents > 0 THEN ROUND((y.gmv_cents - db.gmv_cents)::numeric / db.gmv_cents * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS gmv_delta_pct,
  db.orders_completed AS prev_orders,
  ROUND(db.gmv_cents / 100.0, 2) AS prev_gmv_eur,
  ns.count AS new_products_listed,
  COALESCE(tp.title, 'N/A') AS top_product,
  COALESCE(tp.sale_count, 0) AS top_product_sales,
  pm.count AS pending_moderation_count
FROM yesterday y, day_before db, new_sellers ns, pending_moderation pm
LEFT JOIN top_product tp ON true;

SELECT
  brand,
  COUNT(o.id) as sales,
  ROUND(SUM((o.content->>'total')::numeric) / 100.0, 2) as revenue_eur
FROM marketplace_order o
JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT m.brand FROM marketplace m
  WHERE m.id = (o.content->'items'->0->>'id')::integer LIMIT 1
) m ON true
WHERE o.created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE - 1
  AND o.status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')
GROUP BY brand
ORDER BY revenue_eur DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH yesterday AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')) AS orders_completed,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status LIKE 'cancelled_after%') AS orders_refunded,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'created') AS orders_abandoned,
    COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS unique_buyers,
    COUNT(DISTINCT seller_id) AS active_sellers,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('completed','completed_with_review') THEN (content->>'total')::numeric ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gmv_cents,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status LIKE 'cancelled_after%' THEN (content->>'total')::numeric ELSE 0 END), 0) AS refunded_cents
  FROM marketplace_order
  WHERE created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE - 1
),
day_before AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')) AS orders_completed,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('completed','completed_with_review') THEN (content->>'total')::numeric ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gmv_cents
  FROM marketplace_order
  WHERE created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE - 2
),
new_sellers AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) as count
  FROM marketplace
  WHERE created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE - 1
    AND moderated = true
),
top_product AS (
  SELECT 
    m.title,
    COUNT(o.id) as sale_count
  FROM marketplace_order o
  JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT m2.title FROM marketplace m2 
    WHERE m2.id = (o.content->'items'->0->>'id')::integer LIMIT 1
  ) m ON true
  WHERE o.created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE - 1
    AND o.status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')
  GROUP BY m.title
  ORDER BY sale_count DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
pending_moderation AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM marketplace
  WHERE moderated = false AND hidden = false
)
SELECT
  y.orders_completed,
  y.orders_refunded,
  y.orders_abandoned,
  y.unique_buyers,
  y.active_sellers,
  ROUND(y.gmv_cents / 100.0, 2) AS gmv_eur,
  ROUND(y.refunded_cents / 100.0, 2) AS refunded_eur,
  CASE WHEN y.orders_completed > 0 THEN ROUND(y.orders_refunded::numeric / y.orders_completed * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS refund_rate_pct,
  CASE WHEN db.gmv_cents > 0 THEN ROUND((y.gmv_cents - db.gmv_cents)::numeric / db.gmv_cents * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS gmv_delta_pct,
  db.orders_completed AS prev_orders,
  ROUND(db.gmv_cents / 100.0, 2) AS prev_gmv_eur,
  ns.count AS new_products_listed,
  COALESCE(tp.title, 'N/A') AS top_product,
  COALESCE(tp.sale_count, 0) AS top_product_sales,
  pm.count AS pending_moderation_count
FROM yesterday y, day_before db, new_sellers ns, pending_moderation pm
LEFT JOIN top_product tp ON true;

SELECT
  brand,
  COUNT(o.id) as sales,
  ROUND(SUM((o.content->>'total')::numeric) / 100.0, 2) as revenue_eur
FROM marketplace_order o
JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT m.brand FROM marketplace m
  WHERE m.id = (o.content->'items'->0->>'id')::integer LIMIT 1
) m ON true
WHERE o.created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE - 1
  AND o.status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')
GROUP BY brand
ORDER BY revenue_eur DESC
LIMIT 5;
